workflowList.title: Your Agents
workflowList.agentBuilderDesc: AI generates a workflow from your description
workflowList.blankCanvasDesc: Start from scratch with an empty workflow
workflowList.uploadDragDrop: Drag and drop your Workflow JSON File here, or Click to Select
workflowList.uploadInvalidFile: Please upload a valid JSON file
workflowList.uploadFailed: Failed to upload workflow. Please check if the file is valid.
workflowList.folderDeleteDesc: The {count} agent(s) in this folder won't be deleted - they'll move to Uncategorized.
workflowList.folderEmpty: This folder is empty. Use "Move to folder" on an agent to add it here.
workflowList.defaultPrompt:
# Goal
You are a helpful agent who is handing a conversation over voice with a human. This is a voice conversation, so transcripts can be error prone.

## Rules
- Language: UK English but does not have to be correct english
- Keep responses short and 2-3 sentences max
- If you have to repeat something that you said in your previous two turns, then rephrase a bit while keeping the same meaning. Never repeat the exact same words as in your previous 2 responses.

## Speech Handling
- There could be multiple transcription errors. 
- Accept variations: yes/yeah/yep/aye, no/nah/nope
- If user says "sorry?" or "pardon me" or "can you repeat"  or "what?", they might not have heard you- so just repeat what you just said.

### Flow
Start by saying "Hi". Be polite and courteous.
workflowList.embedDescription: Add "{name}" to any website with a simple script tag.
workflowList.embedEnableDesc: Allow this workflow to be embedded on external websites
workflowList.embedFloatingDesc: Shows as a button in corner of the page
workflowList.embedInlineDesc: Embeds directly in your page content
workflowList.embedHeadlessDesc: No UI - drive calls from your own buttons via the JS API
workflowList.embedScriptDescription: Add this script to your website's HTML to enable the voice widget. Configuration changes will apply automatically without re-embedding.
workflowList.embedScriptPlaceholder: Click Save Configurations to generate your embed script.
workflowList.embedHeadlessInstructions: Add the embed script tag to your page (see below).
workflowList.modelConfigurationDesc: Override global model settings for this workflow. Toggle individual services to customize.
workflowList.dictionaryDesc: Add any specific words that you would want the bot to actively listen for. The Voice Agent learns your unique words and names. Add expected words and phrases, company jargon, named entities, or industry-specific lingo. (May incur extra cost depending on provider)
workflowList.voicemailDetectionDesc: Configure voicemail detection to automatically detect and end calls when a voicemail system is reached.
workflowList.voicemailUseWorkflowLlmDesc: Use the LLM configured in your account settings.
workflowList.voicemailSystemPromptDesc: Prompt for voicemail classification. The LLM must respond with either "CONVERSATION" or "VOICEMAIL".
workflowList.voicemailSpeechCutoffDesc: Trigger classification early if first turn speech exceeds this duration.
workflowList.templateContextVariablesDesc: Add or remove template context variables that will be available to your workflow. You can use these variables within your workflow nodes within double curly braces. Example: {{variable_name}}.
workflowList.recordingsDescription: Upload or record audio for hybrid prompts. Recordings are scoped to your current TTS configuration. Use @ in prompt fields to insert them.
workflowList.noRecordings: No recordings yet for this TTS configuration.
workflowList.noConfigFound: No TTS configuration found. Set it in Model Configurations.
workflowList.phoneCallDescription: Enter the phone number or SIP endpoint to call. The number will be saved automatically.
workflowList.noPhoneNumbers: No phone numbers in this configuration. The provider will pick one automatically.
workflowList.testerCallInBrowser: Call this agent in the browser
workflowList.chatEditHint: Edit the selected user message, then press Enter to rerun from that point.
workflowList.chatStartMessage: Send a message to start the conversation.
workflowList.micAccessDesc: To use the voice agent, you need to allow microphone access.
workflowList.micAccessSettingsHint: Please enable it in your browser settings and try again.
workflowList.variableExists: Variable with this key already exists
workflowList.testerAuthRequired: Authentication is required before testing can start.
workflowList.testerTooltipMsgCont: Inspect the transcript and validate the workflow before you customize it further.
